chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 10 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.36/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.37/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 25.01.2023 Mr. Abdul Aziz Kanhar, Advocate for the Petitioners <><><><>..<><><><> Through instant Constitutional Petition, the petitioners seek protection against the alleged harassment being caused by the respondents No.10 to 12 on contracting marriage by them. It appears that the petitioners have already availed their remedy in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.213/2023, wherein the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur vide order dated 19.01.2023 has directed the SHO Police Station concerned to provide legal protection to the petitioners on their approach, hence, this Constitutional Petition being devoid of merits is dismissed accordingly in limine along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
